mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (user_id, meeting_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{meetingId}, 'REGISTERED')
mapper.update: UPDATE registration SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND status = 'REGISTERED'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM registration WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND meeting_id = #{meetingId}

SELECT r.*, m.title AS meeting_title, m.location AS meeting_location, m.start_time AS meeting_start_time, m.end_time AS meeting_end_time FROM registration r JOIN meeting m ON r.meeting_id = m.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.start_time DESC
SELECT r.*, u.name AS user_name, u.phone AS user_phone FROM registration r JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.meeting_id = #{meetingId} ORDER BY r.registered_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND status = #{status}
